## Description

Include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. If no script was used to generate this description, please explain why.

## Related Issue

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change


- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification


- [ ] Command line checks pass (Scripts run without errors)
- [ ] Build/Type checks pass (for TS/Python projects)
- [ ] Review by AI agents (if applicable)

## Checklist


- [ ] I have used `./scripts/local-commit.sh` for AI-driven commit messages.
- [ ] I have used `./scripts/open-pr.sh` for the PR description.
- [ ] My code follows the project style defined in `skills/`.
